goal: Close all open branches from v3 through disciplined terminal decisions, then attempt weak-window targeted repair on the immutable base before considering any higher-friction exploration.
global_constraints: active-signal-v1@1 is immutable reference — never modify the base snapshot.
Previously rejected branches (H1_post_funding_long, H2_expiry_lead_lag, A1_high_iv_long_v1, A1b_high_iv_momentum, A4_wed_afternoon) must not be reopened.
Static high-IV regime is a volatility mode, not a directional signal — do not reinterpret as alpha.
Every hypothesis branch must reach a terminal decision (promoted or rejected) before the plan can advance past its wave.
Medium-friction wave is locked until low-friction wave is fully exhausted with recorded final verdict and no promoted candidate.
Maximum 2 weak pockets may be selected for specialist repair.
Separate data tasks from research results — never conflate them.

slices.title: Полный closure-audit по прошлым планам
slices.hypothesis: Open a new v4 research project and compile a unified register of all unresolved items from prior plan cycles.
slices.objective: Open a new v4 research project and compile a unified register of all unresolved items from prior plan cycles.
success_criteria: The immutable reference is formally recorded in the project.
evidence_requirements: The immutable reference is formally recorded in the project.

slices.title: Формально закрыть все незавершенные документы и memory-nodes прошлых планов
slices.hypothesis: Eliminate all organizational debt by giving every hanging branch from previous plans a terminal status before new research begins.
slices.objective: Eliminate all organizational debt by giving every hanging branch from previous plans a terminal status before new research begins.
success_criteria: No branch in research memory lacks a terminal status (promoted or rejected).
evidence_requirements: No branch in research memory lacks a terminal status (promoted or rejected).

slices.title: Полностью закрыть ветку A2_iv_acceleration
slices.hypothesis: Drive the primary unfinished branch A2 from v3 to a definitive terminal decision through the full feature-to-backtest chain.
slices.objective: Drive the primary unfinished branch A2 from v3 to a definitive terminal decision through the full feature-to-backtest chain.
success_criteria: A2 has a terminal decision: promoted or rejected with documented reason.
evidence_requirements: A2 has a terminal decision: promoted or rejected with documented reason.
